hero.title: Discover Your Perfect Stay in Cusco
hero.description: Comfortable rooms, great location, and the best prices for your trip.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A place that feels like home
about.description: We offer a warm and welcoming experience for travelers looking for comfort, quality, and excellent service in the heart of Cusco.

rooms.title: Our Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Comfort and quality for every guest
rooms.description: Choose from a variety of rooms designed to suit your needs, whether you are traveling alone, as a couple, or with family.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Everything you need for a great stay
services.description: Enjoy free Wi-Fi, breakfast, airport transfer, and personalized assistance to make your stay unforgettable.
